description: The TouchableData component can be used to create simple touch based interactions.

fields.Hovering: Whether a user's laser is hovering over the component's collider
fields.Touching: Whether a user is clicking on the collider this component is on.
fields.OnHoverStartVibrate: How to vibrate the user's controller when they started hovering on the component.
fields.OnHoverStayVibrate: How to vibrate the user's controller every game update when they are hovering on the component.
fields.OnHoverEndVibrate: How to vibrate the user's controller when they stopped hovering on the component.
fields.OnTouchStartVibrate: How to vibrate the user's controller when they started primary pressing on the component.
fields.OnTouchStayVibrate: How to vibrate the user's controller every game update when they hold primary press on the component.
fields.OnTouchEndVibrate: How to vibrate the user's controller when they ended primary pressing on the component.
fields.EditModeOnly: Whether this component can only be interacted with by users in edit mode.
fields.ActiveUserFilter: How to handle which users can use this component based on the current active user.
